name: Remediation Closure Note - Vendor Access Review.pdf
text:
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
REM-001  Remediation Closure Note
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
Remediation Closure Note — Vendor Access
Review
Closure memo for the evidence-pack remediation associated with NCR-2024-011.
Document ID
REM-001
Owner
Compliance
Prepared Date
2024-04-10
Related NCR
NCR-2024-011
Status
Closed — evidence issue only
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
Closure Scope
This closure note addresses the specific access-review evidence gap raised in NCR-2024-011. It does not close unrelated
open legal or privacy negotiations in the Northwind commercial package.
Closure Evidence
Closure Check
Result
Evidence
Missing approval artifact archived
Complete
EVD-102 Privileged Account Approval Email exported and stored in
evidence repository.
Vendor admin population
revalidated
Complete
IT Operations owner sign-off dated 2024-04-08 and reflected in the
Q2 access review seed file.
Evidence checklist updated
Complete
Vendor-admin approval row now mandatory in GRC evidence
template.
Governance acceptance recorded
Complete
Committee checkpoint of 2024-04-09 accepted the control closure.
Residual open matters remain outside the scope of this closure note: liability cap, final SCC appendix
execution, and the long-form incident-notification clause.
